overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist riding a mechanical mount through a snowy mountain landscape during golden hour. The character traverses narrow cliffside trails, passes a wooden shelter, and stops at a scenic overlook with fog-filled valleys below before continuing along the ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain trail along cliff face

agents.ego_description: riding mechanical mount along narrow snowy path beside rock wall

entered.detail: tall gray rock face forming the left boundary of the trail
narrow winding path covered in deep snow
snow-dusted bushes and grasses along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view of a character riding a mechanical mount along a narrow snowy trail pressed against a tall rock wall. The path winds through a mountainous winter landscape with sparse vegetation visible on the right, bathed in warm golden hour light.

events.description: passing wooden mountain shelter on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding past a wooden shelter and continuing uphill toward the ridge line

entered.detail: small rustic hut with snow-covered roof and open front

segments.scene_description: The trail widens slightly as the character rides past a wooden mountain shelter on the left. The rocky cliff wall falls behind as the path opens toward the ridge, with the mechanical mount continuing its steady ascent through the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: emerging from enclosed trail to open cliff overlook with wooden barriers
mechanical mount slows to a stop at the scenic overlook

agents.ego_description: stopping at the overlook to view the fog-filled valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence along the cliff edge for safety
thick white fog filling the valley below the overlook
tall wooden totem pole with purple fabric decorations

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a dramatic cliffside overlook with a wooden barrier lining the edge. The view opens to reveal a vast valley filled with fog and distant mountains. The mechanical mount comes to a stop near a decorated totem structure, allowing a panoramic view of the landscape.

events.description: resuming forward movement along the narrow ridge

agents.ego_description: riding along the narrow snow ridge away from the overlook toward higher elevation

entered.detail: snow-dusted evergreen trees lining the right side of the ridge

segments.scene_description: The character resumes riding along a narrow snow-covered ridge, leaving the overlook behind. The rocky cliff wall returns on the left while pine trees appear on the right. The path continues winding upward through the pristine winter landscape as the fog-filled valley disappears from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that opens into a vast cliffside vista before narrowing back into a high ridge. It begins with the character riding a mechanical mount along a tight path pressed against a towering rock wall, bathed in the warm glow of golden hour. As the trail widens, the camera passes a wooden mountain shelter and the cliff wall recedes, allowing the path to expand toward the summit. The scene then opens onto a dramatic overlook where the mount stops beside a decorated totem, revealing a panoramic view of a fog-filled valley and distant peaks. Finally, the character resumes their ascent along a narrow snow-covered ridge, with the open valley disappearing as the rocky walls return on the left and pine trees emerge on the right.
